name: Lydie 62" Floor Lamp - FLL4135 - Brass/Black - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Lydie 62 Inch Brass and Black Iron Floor Lamp. This elegant piece combines function and style to enhance any living space. The striking brass and black color scheme adds a bold yet sophisticated touch to your home decor. Crafted from sturdy iron, the Lydie floor lamp stands as a testament to its timeless design and craftsmanship. Standing at a height of 62 inches, it provides ample illumination for any room, creating a warm and inviting ambiance. Whether placed next to a sofa, armchair, or bedside, the Lydie floor lamp is sure to be a focal point of your decor. Its sleek and modern design complements a variety of interior styles, making it a versatile addition to any home. Illuminate your space with the perfect blend of style and functionality.
